opportunity.title: Schedule tasks on the web
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The challenge with web-triggered scheduling isn't just *scheduling*, it's handling eventual consistency between the web event and the agent's execution context. You’ll likely need to implement idempotency checks—confirming a task hasn't already been processed—to avoid unintended side effects when retries happen. Consider the impact of network latency on your scheduling window and how that affects overall system reliability.
actions.reasoning: My work routing LLM requests across providers and orchestrating agent actions gives me a perspective on scheduling tasks triggered by web events.
